steps.title: Emphasize the state order
steps.content: The goal is to show the sequence in which Alaska and Hawaii joined the United States. The relevant notes are that Alaska became the 49th state in January 1959 and Hawaii became the 50th state in August 1959.

steps.title: Reject irrelevant note uses
steps.content: B only discusses the flag. C mentions the shared year but not the before-and-after relationship. D focuses on Hawaii and the flag rather than the order of the two states. The answer is A.
